name: Phaya Media API
tagline: Generate images, videos, audio, and AI chat via the Phaya SaaS backend
description: Phaya is a FastAPI SaaS backend that gives AI agents a single REST API to generate images (Z-Image, Seedream 5.0, Nano Banana 2), videos (Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Seedance 1.5 Pro, Kling 2.6, FFmpeg local), audio (Suno music, Google Gemini TTS), and run LLM chat completions (Phaya-GPT, OpenAI-compatible proxy). All endpoints follow an async job/polling pattern — create a job, receive a job_id, poll for status until complete. Includes a credit system with per-endpoint pricing, Redis-backed job status caching, and Supabase storage for all output media.
